# Log2Incident Project Instructions

- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created. ✅ Created the file.

- [x] Clarify Project Requirements ✅ Asked and received: Python language, no specific frameworks, local deployment.

- [x] Scaffold the Project ✅ Created project structure with directories, files, and basic code for each component.

- [ ] Customize the Project

- [x] Install Required Extensions ✅ No extensions needed for Python project.

- [ ] Compile the Project ✅ Dependencies listed in requirements.txt; install with pip install -r requirements.txt

- [x] Create and Run Task ✅ Created task to run pipeline script.

- [ ] Launch the Project ✅ Project can be launched by running the pipeline script or task.

- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete ✅ README.md and copilot-instructions.md exist and are up to date.

- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
